evals.name: technical-post-grammar-and-facts
evals.expected_output: The post is reviewed with categorized suggestions covering grammar errors (suprisingly, Theres, tense issues), a factual issue flagged (AccessDeniedException), structural feedback, and tone-preserving edits.

evals.name: corporate-babble-tone-rescue
evals.expected_output: The post is reviewed with heavy tone/personality feedback, replacing corporate cliches (leveraging, synergistic, digital transformation) with the author's direct conversational voice. Structure and grammar suggestions also provided.

assertions.text: Review mentions reading author's other posts for voice calibration

evals.name: structural-flow-issues
evals.expected_output: The post is reviewed with structural feedback on sentence fragments, pacing, and the abrupt ending. Grammar corrections and tone-preserving edits also provided.

assertions.text: Review identifies sentence fragments in opening
Review flags 'shared network volume' as incorrect
Review provides structural feedback on transitions
Review calibrates tone against author's other posts
